ogTitle: Laen North vs Laharum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Laen North and Laharum.
heading: Laen North vs Laharum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Laen North, Victoria and Laharum, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Laharum has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Laen North (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Laen North or Laharum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Laen North has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Laharum scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Laen North scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Laharum scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Laen North or Laharum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Laharum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
